! muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
stderr 'execute callback must have zero or one parameter'

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /x Endpoint(execute)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct{}

func (Server) Endpoint(execute func(int, string) error) error { return execute(1, "x") }
